---
title: "Practical - Week 2"
author: "Pierre-Luc"
date: "2026-02-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(AnnotationHub) # to fetch genomes, annotations, etc.
  library(ensembldb)     # to manipulate ensembl gene annotations
  library(GenomicRanges) # data structure for genomic ranges 
  library(epiwraps)      # visualization
})
```

```{r}
dir.create("/mnt/auxiliary/.cache/R/AnnotationHub", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ah <- AnnotationHub::AnnotationHub(
  cache = "/mnt/auxiliary/.cache/R/AnnotationHub"
)
query_results <- query(ah, c("Mus Musculus", "EnsDb"))

ensdb <- ah[["AH113629"]]
ensdb

fly_pcg <- genes(ensdb, filter =~gene_biotype=="protein_coding")
length(fly_pcg)

IntegerList() # use this 
```

```{r}
fly_genes <- genes(ensbd)
granges(fly_genes)
mcols(fly_genes)

plotSignalTracks()
```
